headline_summary: Case A (M=0 chirality-flip topography enlargement) closes at theorem-grade rigor as stepping stone toward Phase-2; substantive strict-strong-form G-B2 content remains structurally vacuous because Decomposition O Case (iii) is empty under M=0 chirality-flip enlargement (chirality grading preserved by modular flow at m_j=0); recommended GO to Phase-2 (Option gamma operator-system Lorentzian pre-length space, Paper 49 drafting).

axiom_a_abelian.mechanism: M=0 chirality-flip generators reduce to spatial multiplication operators on each chirality sheet; any two multiplication operators commute. Bit-exact [M_flip_1, M_flip_2] = diag(0, 0).

axiom_b_strictly_positive.mechanism: Inherited from K+-weak-form: h^L = K_alpha^W / Z lies in M^L which is a subalgebra of the enlarged topography.

axiom_c_character.mechanism: BW vacuum extends to character of enlarged Abelian topography; substantive finding (the Z/2-invariance) discussed in 4.3.

axiom_d_approximate_unit.mechanism: Truncated projector sequence h_n = P_{(n_max(n), N_t(n), T(n))} is M-block-diagonal hence in M^L subset of enlarged topography; all exhaustive-sequence properties transport verbatim.

Lemma_1_1_QPrime.name: Krein M=0-chirality-flip topography
Lemma_1_1_QPrime.key_property: All four Krein topography axioms verified; Z/2-graded structure exhibited

Theorem_1_2_QPrime.name: Two-fold-cover Gelfand spectrum
Theorem_1_2_QPrime.key_property: Gelfand spectrum decomposes as disjoint Z/2-graded cover: M^L_flip_M=0_hat = M^L_hat^(+) sqcup M^L_hat^(-)
Theorem_1_2_QPrime.substantive_finding: BW vacuum is Z/2-invariant (sits at the rho-fixed basepoint, NOT chirality-asymmetric); refines Q1'-Light 3.1 prediction

Theorem_1_3_QPrime.name: Chirality-graded bridge functor on M=0 enlarged substrate
Theorem_1_3_QPrime.key_property: Functor W^flip_M=0: KreinMetaMet_pp^flip_M=0 -> LorPLG_cov^{Z/2} extending A.3' Wick-rotation functor
Theorem_1_3_QPrime.diagram_commutativity: V o W^flip_M=0 = W o U (Phase-1 strictly additive on K+-weak-form bridge)

Theorem_1_4_QPrime.name: Bridge Theorem on Case A
Theorem_1_4_QPrime.key_property: B1'-B4' all verified per chirality sheet
Theorem_1_4_QPrime.honest_scope: B2' closes via Decomposition O Case (iii) emptiness on each sheet, NOT via strict super-additivity; chirality grading preserved by modular flow at m_j=0

finding_1_BW_vacuum_Z2_invariant.name: BW vacuum is Z/2-invariant on enlarged topography
finding_1_BW_vacuum_Z2_invariant.summary: BW vacuum has omega_W^L(M_flip_{N,L,0}) = 0 for all (N,L); corresponds to average state on the two-fold cover (NOT pure character on a single sheet); refines Q1'-Light 3.1 prediction

finding_2_chirality_preserved_by_modular.name: Chirality grading preserved by modular flow at M=0
finding_2_chirality_preserved_by_modular.summary: [K_alpha^W, M_flip_{N,L,0}] = 0 trivially at M=0 (K_alpha^W = 0 on m_j=0 subspace); modular flow preserves chirality grading; structural reason Decomposition O Case (iii) remains empty
finding_2_chirality_preserved_by_modular.phase_2_implication: Activating Case (iii) requires either M != 0 (chirality-flip generators carry non-trivial m_j-rotation) or non-commutative topography extension

finding_3_bridge_extension_is_free.name: Bridge extension is structurally free (analogous to Paper 46 free upgrade)
finding_3_bridge_extension_is_free.summary: Chirality-graded bridge extends K+-weak-form bridge at no structural cost; bridge bound, convergence rate, structural correspondence all transport bit-identically
finding_3_bridge_extension_is_free.phase_2_implication: Substantive content of strong-form bridge requires Case B full M != 0 enlargement where bridge bound and structural correspondence change non-trivially (sqrt(2) to 2 factor per Paper 46 sec:enlarged_substrate prediction)

honest_scope_statements: Case A closes at theorem-grade rigor as STEPPING STONE; substantive Q1' content requires Phase-2 (Case B)
Decomposition O Case (iii) remains EMPTY under M=0 chirality-flip enlargement (no strict super-additivity exercised)
Bridge extension is structurally free (no enrichment beyond K+-weak-form bridge's substantive content)
Q2' (non-commutative MS pre-length space from scratch) is multi-month NCG-research target, NOT addressed by Phase-1 or Phase-2

phase_2_refinement.recommended_structure: Three sub-sprints (Phase-2.A operator-system extension of MS / Phase-2.B bridge functor extension / Phase-2.C off-orbit super-additivity closure) plus Phase-2.D paper drafting

phase_2_a_operator_system_MS_extension.target: Define OSLPLS category (operator-system Lorentzian pre-length space) generalizing MS to non-commutative substrates
phase_2_a_operator_system_MS_extension.phase_1_relevance: Phase-1 chirality-graded OSLPLS is special case (operator system is doubled K+-weak-form algebra with Z/2 grading)

phase_2_b_bridge_functor_extension.target: Extend A.3' Wick-rotation functor W to W^full: KreinMetaMet_pp^{flip,full} -> OSLPLS_cov on full Paper 46 Appendix B enlarged substrate (Abelianness BROKEN)
phase_2_b_bridge_functor_extension.phase_1_relevance: Phase-1 W^flip_M=0 is the structurally additive boundary case; Phase-2.B is non-free extension

phase_2_c_off_orbit_super_additivity.target: Close G-B2 at strict-strong-form via Connes-Rovelli thermal-time stack across distinct KMS states
phase_2_c_off_orbit_super_additivity.phase_1_relevance: Phase-1 G-B2 closes via K+-weak-form mechanism; Phase-2.C closes via genuine off-orbit operator-algebraic super-additivity

compression_pattern_check.k_weak_form_compression_pattern: 10 sub-sprints in one session because A.2' substrate did most of heavy lifting
compression_pattern_check.phase_1_compression_pattern: Single sprint session at theorem-grade rigor; Case A is the analog of K+-weak-form simplification (M-diagonal topography preserved)
compression_pattern_check.phase_2_compression_predicted: UNLIKELY (source category becomes non-Abelian; OSLPLS target requires substantive new construction not in published literature)
compression_pattern_check.compression_mechanism: Phase-1 inherits via the Z/2-doubling architecture: Lemma 1.1-Q1' transports Paper 48 lem:natural_krein_topography; Theorem 1.4-Q1' inherits per chirality sheet from A.3' Theorem 6.4 + A.4'-A Theorem 2.1

failure_modes_avoided: Claiming Case A closes G-B2 at strict-strong-form (it does not; Section 7.2 explicit)
Conflating chirality-grading Z/2 structure with substantive off-axis structure (Theorem 1.3-Q1' shows Z/2 acts trivially on orbit labels)
Promoting Phase-1 from stepping stone to Q1' closure (Section 7.3 explicit GO to Phase-2)
Claiming chirality-graded bridge functor is final form for strong-form bridge (Phase-2 will extend to operator-system level on full enlarged substrate)
concurrent_work_risk_status: CLEAR (per Q1' concurrent-work re-check); no scoop risk; Mondino-Samann community active but has not extended to operator algebras
wh1_status_impact: WH1 PROVEN status maintained; Phase-1 is structurally additive on the Lorentzian-extension arc (Papers 42/43/44/45/46/47/48), not a re-test
recommended_next_actions: Submit Phase-1 memo to PI for review
If PI approves: dispatch Phase-2.A (OSLPLS definition sprint, 2-3 weeks)
Continue concurrent-work monitoring on Mondino-Samann lineage (6-month re-check trigger at 2026-11-24 per Q1' recheck memo)
